LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE REGARDING SEIZURE AND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE REGARDING CONTEMPT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION FOR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE REGARDING CONTEMPT IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO SHOW DEFENDANT'S WILLFUL DISOBEDIENCE OF THE ORDER. (SEE CCP SECTION 1211.5 AND CONN. VS. SUPERIOR COURT (1987) 196 CAL.APP. 3D 774, 784. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ORDER OF SEIZURE IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO PROPERLY PETITION FOR RELIEF REQUESTED. PLAINTIFF MUST ALSO COMPLY WITH CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT, RULE 3.1112(A)(3) REQUIRING A MEMORANDUM IN SUPPORT OF MOTIONS. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Plaintiff People Of The State Of California'S Order To Show Cause Re Contempt
Off Calendar Sep-11-2009 Off Calendar

Plaintiff People Of The State Of California'S Order To Show Cause Re Contempt
Off Calendar Sep-04-2009 Continued To Sep-21-09 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff People of the State of California's Order to Show Cause re: contempt. Patrick S. Berge, Esq. State of California, Public Utilities Commission, Legal Division, (415) 703-1519, appearing Plaintiff and Moving party; Damian R. Fernandez, Esq. of Law Offices of Damian R. Fernandez, (408) 354-8684, appearing for Defendant and opposing party. Hearing held. Mr. Robinson is arraigned today on the civil contempt. Hearing on Order to Show Cause re: contempt is set for September 21, 2009 at 2:00 pm in Department 302. Defense counsel Damian Fernandez will be appointed as counsel to represent Mr. Robinson at the hearing (and will receive court appointed counsel's rate for services). Mr. Fernandez to bring financial information of Mr. Robinson to the hearing, such as tax returns. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

Plaintiff People Of The State Of California'S Order To Show Cause Re Seizure
Off Calendar Sep-04-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff People of the State of California's Order to Show Cause re: seizure. Patrick S. Berge, Esq. State of California, Public Utilities Commission, Legal Division, (415) 703-1519, appearing Plaintiff and Moving party; Damian R. Fernandez, Esq. of Law Offices of Damian R. Fernandez, (408) 354-8684, appearing for Defendant and opposing party. Argued and the Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Motion denied. No petition has been filed pursuant to PUC section 5259 alleging the violation complained of and praying for the appropriate relief. The Court adds: Stipulated Preliminary Injunction is still in place. Plaintiff may seek leave to amend complaint. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2009 Set For Trial On Feb-22-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jan-29-10 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 220

Plaintiff People Of The State Of California'S Order To Show Cause Re Seizure
Off Calendar Aug-04-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff People of the State of California's Order to Show Cause regarding Seizure and Order to Show Cause regarding Contempt. Appearances: Geraldine Kim, Esq. State of California, Public Utilities Commission, Legal Division, (415) 7031470, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for order to show cause regarding contempt is denied without prejudice. Plaintiff fails to show defendant's willful disobedience of the order. (See CCP section 1211.5 and Conn. vs. Superior Court (1987) 196 Cal.App. 3d 774, 784. Plaintiff's request for Order of seizure is denied without prejudice. Plaintiff fails to properly petition for relief requested. Plaintiff must also comply with California Rules of Court, Rule 3.1112(a)(3) requiring a memorandum in support of motions. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2009 Continued To Aug-28-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Plaintiff People Of The State Of California'S Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Mar-13-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff, People of the State of California's Order to Show Cause regarding Preliminary Injunction. Appearances: Geraldine Kim, Attorney, State of California, Public Utilities Commission, Legal Division, (415) 703-1470; appearing for the Plaintiff, People of the State of California; Damian R. Fernandez, Esq., Attorney at Law, (408) 354-8684, appearing for Defendant. Counsel appear with stipulation. The Court adopts and amends its tentative ruling as follows: Granted, pursuant to stipulation. Stipulation and Order for Preliminary Injunction filed in Open Court. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR 2647
